name: italian-learning-platform
description: Italian learning platform using React, Node.js, and Ollama

scripts.install-all: npm install && cd client && npm install
scripts.precompile:push: node server/precompile.js && git add server/lessons/ && git commit -m "chore: auto-push precompiled Italian syllabus lessons" && git push
scripts.build: cd client && npm install && npm run build && cd .. && rm -rf public && cp -r client/dist public
